No excuses…just “stuff”. > > Abbreviating dramatically, at this past Monday’s SSR meeting (4/27), the SSR voted 5 to 2 to recommend to the County Plannin

tasks.title: Invitation to Telluride Table and Ranch Day
tasks.emailSubject: Fwd: Invitation to Telluride Table and Ranch Day
tasks.emailBody: Sent from my iPhone 510-928-5454 Begin forwarded message: *From:* Sarah Lavender Smith <sarahlavendersmith@gmail.com> *Date:* May 4, 2026 at 8:45:24 PM MDT *To:* Morgan Smith <morgancsmith99@gmail.com> *Subject:* *Re: Invitation to Telluride Table and Ranch Day* Unfortunately, that is when I am scheduled to be in Silverton, but I could come back for the Thursday night event. I cannot do the Saturday ranch day because I am committed to work a Hardrock aid station. I’m so sorry, I really would like to be a part of it. Sent from my iPhone On May 4, 2026, at 8:26 PM, Morgan Smith <morgancsmith99@gmail.com> wrote: We should go. Sent from my iPhone 510-928-5454 Begin forwarded message: *From:* Pam Bennett <pam@aldasoro.com> *Date:* May 4, 2026 at 7:05:52 PM MDT *To:* Dirk de Pagter <dirk@telluriderealestatebrokers.com>, Nick Farkouh <nick@basebuilding.com>, Morgan Smith <morgancsmith99@gmail.com>, Jim Lucarelli <jim.lucarelli@compass.com> *Cc:* amp1smp@msn.com, Cristine Mitchell <cris@aldasoro.com> *Subject:* *Re: Invitation to Telluride Table and Ranch Day* Just in case the save the date link didn't correctly send: Here is the RSVP Link: https://forms.gle/kMR8DJfnQ54ZqX3m9 <https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__forms.gle_kMR8DJfnQ54ZqX3m9&d=DwMFaQ&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=WUDOukuzT86ZkZxI9TXJb3Vv_r3nIbmqandVJECdnt8&m=O2VKuIlMJ713nW5fJECZLpEaWAVQEOXReUhh4-S7NNryVfa5hgOMTWg1jL3EkSDI&s=DTXz_1BUVsmuoNv8hTD97GHV1a-6q1fY1XDPRZtsNm8&e=> <Outlook-q4mn
